description: Letter addressed to a jurisconsult, containing six questions with the answers on the reverse side. One of the questions deals with a father who died after having fulfilled his paternal obligations toward his daughter and firstborn, but before he was able to provide similarly for his 3 younger children. Another question is whether a man, vowing a gift 'to the poor in general' has fulfilled his pledge by distributing gifts to a number of indigent individuals. (Information from Mediterranean Society, III, pp. 244, 479)
description_he: מכתב לפוסק הלכה, הכולל שש שאלות עם תשובות בצד ב'. שאלה אחת נוגעת לאב שנפטר לאחר שמילא חובותיו כלפי בתו ובכורו, אך לפני שיכול היה לדאוג ל-3 ילדיו הצעירים.
